steps.title: Identify the time relationship
steps.content: The passage opens with August 1929, when Blake “was already a record breaker” when she won the derby. The second sentence then introduces December 1928. These dates move backward, and the blank must signal this reversal to explain why she held the “already” status.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: “Earlier,” indicates December 1928 comes before August 1929, directly supporting why Blake “was already” a record breaker. The other three choices reverse the timeline, create a false contrast, or misidentify the logical link. A is correct.
